title: Sentiment-Technical Z-Score Composite Fusion Gate
summary: Implement a formal Z-score normalization and weighted linear fusion of the technical composite score and the multi-source sentiment score before they enter the Claude agent decision layer. Currently Decifer combines signals additively without cross-normalizing them, which means that a high-volatility sentiment day can swamp technical signals. Research from a January 2026 paper (arXiv:2601.19504) using the identical yfinance + sentiment stack found that normalized fusion of both signal types outperformed each in isolation.
expected_impact: A 2026 ComSIA-accepted paper using yfinance on 100 S&P 500 stocks showed hybrid technical+sentiment model outperformed NASDAQ-100 by >43% over 2023-2025; sentiment-enhanced MACD (ScienceDirect 2025) showed 'substantial improvements in profitability and stability' vs technical-only baseline.
